believer.arena01_intro: Ladies and gentlemen, welcome to the gauntlet! Let's see what you've got.
believer.hazard_warning: Careful! That hazard nearly had you.
believer.low_hp: You're hurt — find cover before you go down!
believer.suspicion_warning: Easy now... they're starting to notice.
believer.tut_movement: Get moving! Strafe, throttle, the works — show me you can fly this thing.
believer.tut_jetpack: Now punch that boost and climb! Don't be shy with the thrusters.
believer.tut_hazards: Hazard ahead! Razors, crushers, lasers — touch 'em and it'll hurt. Dodge, don't muscle through.
believer.tut_no_ammo: That hidden popper of yours? Never needs reloading. Don't ask how, just fire when it's safe.

doubter.suspicion_warning: Hm. Getting sloppy, aren't we? They're starting to notice.

ally.arena01_intro: Welcome back. Let's get you through this one — together.
ally.hazard_warning: Watch it — I've got your back, but that hazard nearly had you.
ally.low_hp: You're hurt bad. Get to cover — I'll help where I can.
ally.suspicion_warning: They're onto you. Let me help you slip away.
ally.tut_hazards: Hazard ahead. I'll call out the timing — just listen and move when I say.
ally.tut_no_ammo: Still got infinite shots on that thing. Lucky you. Just don't get cocky with it.
